Occupation.description: Groups of pilots categorized by their primary occupation.

Rate_per_1000.description: Aviation accident rate per 1,000 pilots in each occupation group; used to contrast with the rate per 100,000 hours to explain why the two sets of figures give different answers.

Rate_per_100000_hr.description: Aviation accident rate per 100,000 hours of flight time in each occupation group; used to identify that housewives and academic students had the highest accident risk when adjusted for flying hours.
